headline: Why Occidental Petroleum Is a Buy Despite Falling Oil Prices
summary: With a possible peace deal in sight, the oil producer’s years of problems have finally led to an opportunity for investors.

headline: Unpacking Q1 Earnings: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) In The Context Of Other Diversified Upstream E&P Stocks
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who didn’t). Let’s take a look at how diversified upstream e&p stocks fared in Q1, starting with ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP).

headline: GOP lawmakers' portfolios are migrating to Trump favorites like Intel and bitcoin
summary: Republican lawmakers' brokerage accounts have undergone a significant shift as GOP members of Congress load up on investments into areas touted by President Trump.

raw.headline: GOP lawmakers' portfolios are migrating to Trump favorites like Intel and bitcoin
raw.summary: Republican lawmakers' brokerage accounts have undergone a significant shift as GOP members of Congress load up on investments into areas touted by President Trump.

headline: Republican lawmakers are trading like Trump, piling into Big Tech stocks
summary: Republican lawmakers are adjusting their investment portfolios to keep up with President Trump's latest trades, the US leader favoring Nvidia (NVDA), Intel (INTC), and other Big Tech names. Yahoo Finance Washington Correspondent Ben Werschkul reports on this trend, giving rise to renewed concerns around Congressional stock trading.

headline: BW LPG Limited Announces New Board Member
summary: SINGAPORE, May 29, 2026--The Board of BW LPG Limited ("BW LPG" or the "Company", OSE ticker code: "BWLPG.OL", NYSE ticker code: "BWLP") is pleased to announce the appointment of Kevin James Mackay as a Member of the Board of Directors.
